title: Vertical slabs
description: Adds a vertical slab varient for every block that has a slab block
body:
Adds a vertical slab varient for every block that has a slab block!

You can craft the vertical slabs by putting 3 blocks as a colum over one another resulting in 6 Slabs.

You can craft the vertical slabs back to a full block by putting two next to each other.
